name: FRANKLIN COVEY CO
business: Franklin Covey sells subscription-based leadership and organizational performance improvement solutions, including the All Access Pass for enterprises and the Leader in Me program for educational institutions. It also provides consulting, coaching, and training services.

exposures.sentence: We are strengthening our platforms and offerings to leverage the quickly changing capabilities and opportunities related to AI to improve our solutions and help clients develop and engage their people to achieve their strategic goals.
We could incur additional liabilities and our reputation could be damaged if we do not protect client data or if our information systems are breached.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. corporate training expenditures are estimated at approximately $188 billion (about $400 billion globally).
tamClaims.sentence: According to Training Industry s 2025 State of the Industry Report, U.S. corporate training expenditures are estimated at approximately $188 billion (about $400 billion globally).

tamClaims.claim: IBIS World estimates U.S. spending on Human Resource Consulting at approximately $39 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: IBIS World estimates U.S. spending on Human Resource Consulting at approximately $39 billion.

tamClaims.claim: External curriculum budgets estimated at around $2 billion in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: In addition, our offerings address operating budgets allocated by leaders to achieve mission-critical objectives and business transformations. The addressable market for our Education solutions is also significant, including external curriculum budgets (estimated at around $2 billion in the U.S.) as well as funding from state, federal, and local governments, foundations, and other community sources.
